embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
@everyone 🚀 **We're Expanding Wave Drop Maps — Here's What's Coming**

Thank you all for the incredible support! We're thrilled to announce major expansions to our services:

**📍 Drop Map Production Expansion**
Starting next season, we're scaling up significantly:
• **4X increase** in the volume of drop maps we create
• **2X more markers** per map for greater detail
• **Guaranteed drop maps for every major landing spot** on the map

**🌍 New Market: Free Surge Routes**
Building on the success of our free loot routes and drop maps, we're entering the surge route market. With more players than ever qualifying for finals and set lobbies, we're providing the same premium quality maps as our competitors—completely free.

**⭐ Premium Loot Routes 2.0**
Our upgraded loot route system will be unmatched:
• Detailed game plans for every rotation
• Strategic baseup locations
• Optimal loot-grabbing paths
• Safe endgame positioning strategies

**This is only possible because of you.** Your continued support and use of creator code **"Wavedropmaps"** directly funds these improvements. We reinvest every dollar back into making this community better.

Thanks for being part of the Wave! 🌊

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
@everyone 🚀 **We're Expanding Wave Drop Maps — Here's What's Coming**

Thank you all for the incredible support! We're thrilled to announce major expansions to our services:

**📍 Drop Map Production Expansion**
Starting next season, we're scaling up significantly:
• **4X increase** in the volume of drop maps we create
• **2X more markers** per map for greater varitty
• **Guaranteed drop maps for every landing spot** on the map

**🌍 New Market: Free Surge Routes**
discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX
Building on the success of our free loot routes and drop maps, we're entering the surge route market. With more players than ever qualifying for finals and set lobbies, we're providing the same premium quality maps as our competitors—completely free.

**⭐ Premium Loot Routes 2.0**
Our upgraded loot route system will be unmatched:
• Detailed game plans for every rotation
• Strategic baseup locations
• Optimal loot-grabbing paths
• Safe endgame positioning strategies

**This is only possible because of you.** Your continued support and use of creator code **"Wavedropmaps"** directly funds these improvements. We reinvest every dollar back into making this community better.

Thanks for being part of the Wave! 🌊

after.content:
@everyone 🚀

═══════════════════════════════════════

YOUR GRIND IS PAYING OFF

You're getting better. Your mechanics are sharper. Your rotations are cleaner.

This is just the beginning.

═══════════════════════════════════════

🗺️  WE PIONEERED THIS

We created the **drop map market**.
We created the **loot route market**.

Now we're creating the **surge route market**.

And yeah — we're doing it **first. We're doing it free. We're doing it 10X better.**

═══════════════════════════════════════

📊 WHAT'S DROPPING

→ **4X more drop maps** (every spot, guaranteed)
→ **2X detailed markers** per map
→ **Free surge routes** (others charge $$ for trash)
→ **Premium loot routes 2.0** — rotations, baseups, endgame strats

═══════════════════════════════════════

🎯 THE REAL TALK

You're improving. You're qualifying. You're making finals.

This product exists **because** you leveled up.

But we need your help to keep innovating.

**Use code: WAVEDROPMAPS**

Every purchase funds the next update. Every code used = we're pushing harder.

This is how we stay ahead.

═══════════════════════════════════════

Join our server for early access:
discord.gg/AbAQea2xsX

LET'S GO 🌊
